creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #2)
Yes. My IDS is running stable/11 r326928 amd64, and net-mgmt/iftop doesn't display any IPv6 traffic on any of the monitoring interfaces. net-mgmt/iftop shows both IPv4 and IPv6 traffic on the management interface. I'm not sure whether the problem is within the kernel or iftop. If the bug proves too difficult to resolve, then let's close this PR and go on.
